# BP-160 positive: Cobra command uses Run and swallows the operation error
lang: go
file: BP-160-vulnerable.go
variant: cobra
---
package main

import "github.com/spf13/cobra"

func rootCmd() *cobra.Command {
	return &cobra.Command{
		Use: "sample",
		Run: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) {
			runApp()
		},
	}
}

func runApp() error { return nil }
